title: Raccoon Removal in Murray Hill, Manhattan | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Murray Hill, Manhattan. Safe, humane extraction from homes and buildings. Licensed experts serving Murray Hill residents. Call today for fast service!
intro: Murray Hill residents facing raccoon intrusions need swift, professional intervention to protect their historic townhomes and mid-rise apartments. Our raccoon removal specialists serve the Murray Hill neighborhood with humane trapping, exclusion services, and full property remediation. Whether raccoons have invaded your rooftop, chimney, or basement, we provide comprehensive solutions tailored to Murray Hill's unique architectural landscape.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Murray Hill's residential and commercial properties with licensed, insured raccoon removal services. Our technicians understand the specific challenges of Murray Hill's dense urban environment and respond quickly to protect your property with safe, effective, and humane wildlife control methods.
localContext: Murray Hill's mix of pre-war walkups, brownstones near Park Avenue, and residential buildings around the Morgan Library create multiple entry points for opportunistic raccoons seeking shelter. The tree-lined streets and proximity to the East River corridor make this neighborhood particularly attractive to urban wildlife, requiring specialized local expertise for effective removal.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Murray Hill?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Murray Hill typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and extent of damage remediation needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Murray Hill, Manhattan?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in Murray Hill due to the abundance of food sources, mature trees, and older buildings with accessible attics, chimneys, and roof spaces. The neighborhood's proximity to green spaces and the East River also attracts wildlife into the area.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Murray Hill property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Murray Hill raccoon removal emergencies. Initial trapping typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of animals, followed by exclusion work to seal entry points and prevent future intrusions.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in Murray Hill humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our raccoon removal methods comply with New York State wildlife regulations and prioritize humane treatment. We use live trapping techniques and follow all NYC laws regarding wildlife relocation, ensuring ethical handling throughout the entire removal process.
